transcription.text: So I got this friend who said T-Mobile's network used to suck. His words. But things change. It turns out that now T-Mobile has the best network. By like, a lot. Hey dude, you won't believe where I am.

But things change. It turns out that now T-Mobile has the best network. By like, a lot.
